title: ReOpenable Vaults
description: Allow Vaults to be opened again after a cooldown. Just like with Trial Spawners!
body:
Allow Vaults to be **opened again** after a cooldown (default's 30 minutes).

This DataPack incorporates _trial spawner_ mechanics into _vaults_. \
This allows players to **open the same _vault_ every so often** (just like with _trials spawners_).

## Configurable:
You can change the cooldown in the DataPak menu. Run `/trigger rov` to open the menu.\
Possible values range from 1 second to 30 days with the default value being 30 minutes.
![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/362ee5b3c3ead32cf1ed4a2e78ed3a2f2d0f2b88.png)

## Works for both, Vaults and Ominous Vaults.
![Vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b62a9c707fed93b6a5106f229eef4d5e2783ab8.png)
![Ominous Vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efdd2e0cbb94767f23dc103a8dae786057686178.png)

## If instaled in existing world:
**Step on top** of an already opened vault to enable its refresh contdown.
